reviews.review_description: I got this game because my mom's boyfriend showed it to me, and I LOVED it. The dinos, the thrill, everything was awesome about it, although it said that it had multiplayer even though there is no option. Also, they should add a couple more maps and dinosaurs like a bronto/brachiosaurus, dilophasaurus, more mammals (like a mammoth), and more. The other maps they should add is like a ice biome, forest biome, and swamp biome. But other than that, really good game and you should get for your vr headset. my rating, 9.99/10
I had a few bugs but the game overall is good but no updates no fun after finished game

I’ve had this game in I believe since its release and even now I revisit this game I have almost entirely completed it with only a couple missing stars but it’s still sad that the multiplayer isn’t here even after they said it would I believe around or during launch witch leads me to believe that they have abandoned this game witch for me is heartbreaking but I still really think it’s a great game
It needs multiplayer, everything else is amazing
Frinkin flappin awesome! Dinosaurs, weapons, and blood! They’re all my favorite things!!! Highly recommend to anyone that enjoys those things as much as I do.

After a 1h hunt I got stuck between 2 rocks the exit in sight! Please implement something to prevent such glitches. Or an option to get free. Or checkpoints to restart. This is really annoying.
Game abandoned? No patching anymore? Play an hour and you can see a lot to improve! E.g. the animations and all the glitches occurring.

Opinion:
In my opinion, primal hunt is an extremely fun and enjoyable game. At times, the game is quite easy, maybe reducing the fun and enjoyment factor for you. 

About the game:
Primal hunt is a dinosaur (and prehistoric animal) hunting game. You can take down the tiny compsognathus, the packs of raptors, groups of enteledont and even the tyrannosaurus Rex. Tech variations available with every Dino. Dinosaurs are fitted with missile launchers, sniper rifles, and more health. Dinosaurs come in multiple categories: Whelp, adult, alpha and legendary. Place collected trophies in your trophy lodge. (Note: not enough space for every trophy, so think carefully about what you want to put up). There is also too many spaces and not enough trophies to fill the gaps. 

Developers:
Developers have said multiplayer would be available, but after over a year, no dlcs, news or updates have been in game. If developers see this, I would like to know why. 

Conclusion: 
After reading my review, it's up to you wether you would like to try Primal Hunt. If you do try the game, take into consideration factors I have mentioned.

Triggers: Flashing Lights, Blood

Also developers, if you do see this, i (and many other people) would like to know why there is no continued support, thank you.

One of two top games for me! I only play single player games for so many reasons it would take a book to list. This one exceeds most. Fun fast great interface and not a money pit. Need to make more and faster in game earned upgrades and advancement. Otherwise super!👍😏

It’s a little bit difficult but if they add multiplayer, it’s going to be so fun and they have all the stuff they need for it. They just need to add it and also make it a little easier I would say. 

(P.s. the tech Gallimimus is harder then you think so don’t be mad at yourself if you die)
(P.s.s explosive arrows and freeze traps or Op)

Do not support this game. I bought this game when it first came out because the devs promised multiplayer in the future. 

Since then, the devs have dropped all support for the game and have turned their attention elsewhere. This game is meh at best without multiplayer and you can easily find better archery vr games.

Do not expect these devs to keep their word or try to support their own game. I will update if anything changes but I doubt it.
Best game I’ve played
Don't waste your money or time. I was excited for the concept of the game but was very disappointed. Please add mixed reality mode

Replace , with . to get dis count code.

goo,su/75btVY9
Impossible to do grapple hold move in the tutorial, and you can't play the rest of the game unless you pass the tutorial, so for mere mortals this gave is useless.
Yes it was fun hands down but I didn't like the Atmosphere it was very nauseating but I didn't like how it was.

Honestly i wanted to love this game. It started out fun but you quickly unlock arrows that almost break the game if you’re looking for any challenge. The first time i saw the trex i killed it… i have had little to no trouble with any of the challenges and missions so far.. Once you unlock trip wires and explosive arrows the game is laughable. Even with the enhancements it is not hard… You get EMP arrows. 

Is the game fun? Ehhh.. its okay. Very repetitive. Wish it was harder or had a way to scale the difficulty up. I can not recommend this game at full price. I’d wait for a heavy discount unless you’re just wanting to mindlessly slaughter dinosaurs.
fun

Let's start with the positives:

The scale of dinosaurs is spectacular. It really gets your heart going seeing these big animals charging at you. Animations are very well made. Sound design is good. Graphics are good aswell, it's totally enough to draw you into the game. Stealth works nicely and I really like the traps in the game. I'm easily scared in VR (Jurassic world aftermath gave me hard time to finish it despite me loving the game) but this game has the right amount of thrill to not be off putting. Plus there's a 2 player co-op being worked on which will come +- february. 

Some minor negatives:

Bugs here and there which devs already confirmed to be patched soon (like by the end of the launch week). Not really clear progression system on how to unlock new gear. Skill system could have been more impactfull. You can cheese most fights by standing on platforms, but this one is easily avoided, just dont do that. I dont like the gore BUT you can turn it off in game and that's a gamesaver for me. Thanks devs for thinking about this one, I'm enjoying myself while not ripping organs from dinosaurs. 

Overall, a really solid game and easy 4/5 stars.

Love how it was advertised that the people that made such a classic, made this one. However sadly doesn’t even compare to Turok at all. Literally just a hunting game. Which was done way better on a VR game on the Rift. Graphics are very poor, gameplay is poor. Price is too high for what’s not here. Feels like it should still be in a beta stage.

I enjoyed the first hunt and was eager to head out with my next permit. I explored my vacant 
trophy room and imagined what it would look like with each plaque and pillar showcasing the spoils of my journey. I was actually excited to hunt. 

Well the joke was on me. Fast forward a bit and I soon realized that I had mistaken. I was the one being hunted and just spent the last 30 minutes hiding in this bush as I watched a pack of Raptors sprinting after 3 little whelps. Somehow one of them managed to attack the raptor from behind, which helped me claim the kill. 

Being on the Forest floor is absolutely terrifying. The grapple arrows are a great idea but I notice my accuracy fall drastically as I'm being chased by any one of the many carnivores. When you finally gain the high ground, the fun really begins as arrows fly towards your target. Knowing they are outmatched, the dinosaurs don't stick around, causing you to explore the forest floor once more. 

Finally bagging a permit Is a great feeling! The skill tree offers useful incentives that I had hoped for while out on the hunt, and each permit offers optional objectives to help speed up the process. 

Primal Hunt is now one of my top Quest games and I can't wait for the upcoming multiplayer!

Embark on an exciting adventure where you can indulge your passion for dinosaurs while hunting them in this thrilling game. From my personal experience, the gameplay is incredibly fun and engaging. As you successfully hunt down your quarry, you'll have the opportunity to collect them as trophies, giving you a visual representation of your achievements. The game also adds an element of mystery, as you'll have to use clues on the map to track down your prey. It reminded me of the classic game Turok, and I highly recommend it to anyone who loves dinosaurs and wants to bring a little more of them into their life.

Use my referral link to buy Primal Hunt and you can get 25% off your purchase https://ocul.us/3wcUIXA
This game sucks
I want my money back... I go online and say everything

reviews.review_title: Good if got polished... but it never wil
reviews.review_description: Good game but devs have dropped support for this game and they never added an option to disable the HUD :(

The main hunting experience is good, I enjoy that. But the level designs, like the tech gallimimus level, can be god awful at times with how little hiding spots there are and such harsh restrictions. Also the traps and lures don't really work. Please fix that, that was a bummer to find out.

reviews.review_title: Cooperative mode on its way, cant wait!
reviews.review_description:
I got addicted to it from the very start! Can't wait for cooperative mode so I can fight against more difficult dinos with my friends! 

Mechanics are super easy to learn. 

Finally a game in which we can level up our character, pick the loadout, collect Gear and upgrade it to defeat bigger and stronger dinosours!

As a Player who played in death unchained previously which has the best bow mechanics out there - Primal Hunt managed to nail down the bow mechanics very well! Had no trouble switching from one game to another!

Very good design!

I've really been enjoying this game its really entertaining but I ran into a small issue, when I went to go and launch it it wouldn't let me due to it "syncing" what ever that's for and I can't run the game I've tried all sorts of work around even uninstalling the app to see if that would work but it's still not working, I'll try another way tomorrow and hope it works. It's such a shame this game is amazing.

developer_response.body: This appears to be an issue with using an old version of Cloud Saves on the Quest. We have updated Primal Hunt on the Quest to use the new Cloud Save system, hopefully this will resolve issues of the game getting stuck syncing.

reviews.review_description: This game is very fun with a few minor bugs. The graphics are just your base level graphics, but the gameplay makes up for it. The feeling of tracking and hunting beasts that are well over 10 feet tall will give you an adrenaline rush that will keep bringing you back for more and more. If you’ve ever played Dino hunter: deadly shores, then this will further expand your Dino hunting dreams. It is an extremely fun and entertaining game with only a few minor bugs that can easily be fixed by the devs. This game gets a solid 8/10, would highly recommend!

Great game about hunting big ol dinos, I recommend to every fan of this type of games :D

Only downside for me is not being able to hide by crouching in real life. But overall it's fire!

developer_response.body: We have added the ability to crouch in real life to activate stealth in the latest patch.

reviews.review_description: Primal hunt does not show refund code to get your money back
This game is off to a great start. The start zone does a great job. Graphics looks good, audio sounds great.
I've had this game for a good while, and it doesn't disappoint.  Much like the graphics of Turok it has long distance fog but still very pretty. It will provide hours of fun for all ages.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games ive played.
reviews.review_description:
Primal hunt is a dinosaur hunting game, you have contracts, where you have to hunt certain dinosaurs. To hunt them, you find hints in a world full of dinosaurs and then it gives you a range on your map where your dinosaur could be. While you hunt you get a bow and arrow, you can upgrade it, and use traps and different arrows to hunt your target and anything else that gets in the way, there’s also a amazing stealth system,

Honestly the start of the game is kinda long and boring, but only for like 20 minutes, then you get into the carnivores and it gets FUN hunting them! It’s crazy to just watch and see how much you improve, I used to only use stealth, and only kill the target dinosaur, but now I just run around, without a care in the world, and I kill everything that comes into my path, I have over 13+ hours on this game, I’ve defeated the t-Rex and the tech t-Rex.

Tech dinosaurs do seem kinda lazy, it seems like a lazy way to make the game harder, but I will admit. It works very well, and definitely gets me way more scared than a regular dino.

Its been a long while since Ive played Turok but Im more acquainted with Monster Hunter. The way you enter the hunts and search the map for the dinos gives me those vibes which is a great thing. I get excited about going into the hunts because win or lose the outcome is brutal so Id rather be on the winning side. Even grappling to safety is satisfying when Im in danger. Fun game that got me hooked from the start.
My favorite game on oculus btw if you like monster hunter you will probably like it even more

reviews.review_title: Fun dino shooter but low on hunting
reviews.review_description:
Graphics are nice and mostly stable. Gameplay is well balanced. A few tips for devs
*grappling to platforms often leave no way down but to jump.. Needs more ground connections or a means to get down without fall damage.
*Field dressing needs more steps to it to feel like it matters... Make us feel like a hunter not a robot.
*more hunting mechanics like scents, lures, repellents etc.
*more story/lore... Why does my robot avatar bleed or gets winded. Maybe fight off some poachers.
*an open hunt mode... If there isn't one later.
*color code the bowstring to match the arrow type.
*pull the bow from your back for a more immersive feel.

Update: loses 2 stars due to being buggy with no sign of fixing. Dinosaurs ignore each other to the point they try walking through each other. Raptors attack you through walls, items drop and disappear sometimes, biggest problem yet happened with tech enteledont running outside permit zone so it's impossible to pursuit.
What do I do my oculus has/has not been stolen but nothing has updated and it has not been used
Bought this game yesterday. I was hesitant as wasn't sure if it was a game that I'd like. But I absolutely love it.

I have so much fun playing this game, but every time I spend so much time on a level the game glitches! It’s so frustrating To have to start the level all over again. This has happened to me three times on really hard levels where I spent a lot of time to make it through. I’m honestly done playing this game for a while…

reviews.review_title: Can't start game. It says syncing
reviews.review_description: Everytime I start this game it says the syncing thing. Then I hear a second of music then the game closes. Does this all the time. Can you guys please fix this. I really wanted to try the game out.

developer_response.body:
We just fixed the issue that causes this to happen. Leave the Quest pugged in, connected to WIFI, and powered on overnight to see if it fixes the issue. 
If not, the only way I know of currently to get it to work again is to uninstall Primal Hunt, restart the Quest, then install Primal Hunt again. WARNING: Doing this will probably result in losing progress in the game. I hope you don't need to reinstall, we're sorry for letting this issue slip through. As I said, it shouldn't happen again in the future.
